name: HealthLynked Corp
summary: Overview HealthLynked Corp. (the Company, we, our,) is a healthcare technology company incorporated in the State of Nevada on August 6, 2014. We operate across three primary divisions Digital Healthcare, Health Services, and Medical Distribution each dedicated to leveraging innovative solutions that enhance patient care, reduce costs, and generate long-term value for stockholders.
